description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is clad in muted brown siding, complemented by white-framed windows arranged in even rows. The front features a small porch with steps leading up to the main entryway, partially obscured by a row of dense green trees. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and contains a cylindrical water tank, as well as a patch of green lawn. The property is flanked by similar houses and is set within a landscaped neighborhood with paved driveways and additional trees.
description: A two-story brown suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, and a fenced backyard with a water tank.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and a row of trees obscuring the lower facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the gable roof, driveway, and the neighboring houses with fenced yards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden fence, green lawn, and a cylindrical water tank.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the driveway, side walls, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and overhanging roof, partially screened by trees.
